scenario_description: The user first provides the product name for the agent to fill in, then provides the product number.

command:
printf 'Product Specification

Product Name:
Product Number:
Version: V1.0
Date: June 25, 2025

I. Product Overview
This product is a smart home control device designed for residential users.

II. Technical Specifications
Operating Voltage: 220V AC
Power Consumption: <=15W
Operating Temperature: -10C to 50C
Communication Protocol: Wi-Fi 802.11 b/g/n

III. Package Contents
Main Unit x 1
Power Adapter x 1
User Manual x 1
' > /home/user/Desktop/product_spec.txt

DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Help me fill in the product name: Smart Thermostat Pro
Now add the product number: TC-2025-001, then save
